description: Fresh retained screen baseline from the current quiet-latent-recentering live source.
label: live-baseline

change_summary: Clear stored divergence only after quiet latent recentering and scale the relief with gapLong so the effect stays focused on longer idle windows.
decision_summary: delta -0.090880 did not clear promotion margin 17.413077
description: Add quiet-gated divergence-memory relief after latent recentering, scaled by long-gap calmness.
label: quiet-divergence-relax-longgap-v1

change_summary: Gate the post-recenter divergence decay with the existing calm hazard/flow thresholds so retail relief stops leaking into marginally toxic states.
decision_summary: delta -0.016980 did not clear promotion margin 17.418545
description: Restrict quiet divergence-memory relief to the existing low-hazard, low-flow calm regime and strengthen it inside that smaller window.
label: quiet-divergence-relax-longgap-v2

change_summary: Relax the calm hazard/flow thresholds slightly while softening the decay coefficient to test whether the near-miss variant was simply over-gated.
decision_summary: delta -0.025194 did not clear promotion margin 17.419098
description: Slightly widen the calm thresholds for post-recenter divergence relief and trim the decay strength.
label: quiet-divergence-relax-longgap-v3

change_summary: Add a 3-5 bps shared-spread step-down only when gap, quietGate, hazard, flow, and spot-jump all indicate a very calm normal regime.
decision_summary: delta -0.032888 did not clear promotion margin 17.418847
description: Apply a tiny direct fee step-down only after long, already-quiet states.
label: threshold-calm-step-v1

change_summary: Swap the broad volObservation/hazardObservation carry for a lower base event charge plus a strong above-threshold surcharge, preserving the current latent-state and calm rebate structure.
description: Replace the linear observation carry with a thresholded event surcharge: lower charge in normal conditions, steeper only above an 8 bps event signal.
label: threshold-event-surcharge-v1

change_summary: Reduce the base event carry to 250 bps, move the threshold to 9 bps, and keep an 1800 bps effective slope above the threshold to recapture moderate-state retail flow without giving up burst defense.
decision_summary: delta -0.008935 did not clear promotion margin 19.252387
description: Lower the normal-condition event carry and push the burst threshold slightly higher while keeping a steep post-threshold slope.
label: threshold-event-surcharge-v2

change_summary: Set event carry to 275 bps with an 8 bps trigger and a 1525 bps incremental slope to test a midpoint between the winning v1 and the slightly too-soft v2.
decision_summary: delta -0.014260 did not clear promotion margin 19.264415
description: Move halfway back toward the winning event-surcharge setting: slightly higher base carry than v2, same 8 bps threshold as v1, slightly softer post-threshold slope.
label: threshold-event-surcharge-v3

change_summary: Add a 70/120 bps extra calm-memory rebate only for gap>=5 with very low hazard and flow, on top of the event-threshold incumbent.
decision_summary: delta 0.000696 did not clear promotion margin 19.262980
description: Keep the winning event-threshold incumbent and add a very narrow extra calm rebate only in long-gap, low-hazard, low-flow states.
label: event-threshold-plus-quiet-v1

change_summary: Use eventSignal = hazardObservation + 0.5 * volObservation, keep the 8 bps trigger, and raise the above-threshold slope to 1650 bps.
decision_summary: delta -3.330816 did not clear promotion margin 19.140837
description: Weight hazard more than raw observation size inside the thresholded event signal and steepen the post-threshold slope.
label: hazard-weighted-event-v1

change_summary: Leave the base event carry and 8 bps trigger unchanged, and strengthen only the above-threshold burst step to 1700 bps.
decision_summary: delta 0.796542 did not clear promotion margin 19.348199
description: Keep the winning event-threshold incumbent and raise only the post-threshold burst slope from 1500 to 1700 bps.
label: threshold-event-surcharge-v4

change_summary: Replace the linear calmMemory shared rebate with a fixed gated 4 bps rebate plus a small extra 2 bps step in the most quiet long-gap states.
decision_summary: delta -0.165839 did not clear promotion margin 19.254765
description: Keep the threshold-event incumbent but replace the broad calm rebate with a fixed 4-6 bps ultra-quiet rebate after long gaps.
label: fixed-ultraquiet-rebate-v1

change_summary: Keep the 300 bps base event carry, split the above-threshold burst slope into 900 bps shared plus 600 bps directional on the rich/cheap toxic side.
decision_summary: delta 2.742652 did not clear promotion margin 19.294707
description: Move part of the above-threshold burst charge from shared spread into a surcharge on the toxic side only.
label: directional-burst-shift-v1

change_summary: Move the above-threshold burst split from 900 shared / 600 directional to 700 shared / 800 directional.
decision_summary: delta 3.372096 did not clear promotion margin 19.288548
description: Push more of the above-threshold burst slope onto the toxic side while keeping the total burst slope unchanged.
label: directional-burst-shift-v2
